problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
